rulings.Case Title: U.S. BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSTEE FOR VS. GABRIELA FRANCO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for October 24, 2011, line 1. Defendant Tony A. Martinez' Motion to Quash Service of Summons is denied. Untimely-CCP 1167.4. The reply to be filed in 5 days. Prevailing party to prepare order. (501\REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for October 24, 2011, line 2. Defendant Craig West's Demurrer to Complaint is off calendar. No papers. Untimely. (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for October 24, 2011, line 3. Defendant Daniel E. Davis' Demurrer to Complaint is off calendar-settled. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: OTR, AN OHIO GENERAL PARTNERSHIP, AS NOMINEE OF VS. BRENT W. COON, A PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons And Complt
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for October 24, 2011, line 4. Defendant Brent W. Coon, a Professional Corporation's, Motion to Quash Service of Summons is granted. No opposition. (510/REQ)
